title: GST/HST rebate – Certain investment plans and segregated funds of an insurer - Canada.ca
content:
## GST/HST rebate – Certain investment plans and segregated funds of an insurer
Form GST189 – Reason code 25
Reason code 25 provides different rebates of all or a portion of the provincial part of the HST paid or payable by certain investment plans and segregated funds of an insurer ( subsection 261.31(2) of the Excise Tax Act ).

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
